summary: Sparse review noting enjoyment of additional harmonica, but provides no concrete details on recording or performance.
review: The lone comment praises the extra harmonica parts yet offers no insight into sound quality, setlist, or band execution, leaving both the audio fidelity and show assessment largely unknown.
